title: Sign in to DEEIX Chat
newPasswordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters, not digits only

toasts.codeRequired: Enter a verification code or recovery code.
toasts.loginFailed: Sign-in failed. Check your account and password.
toasts.loginRetry: Sign-in failed. Please try again later.
toasts.challengeExpired: Two-factor verification expired. Sign in again.
toasts.providerStartFailed: Unable to start third-party sign-in. Refresh the page and try again.
toasts.passwordInvalid: Password must be at least 8 characters and not digits only.
toasts.registerFailed: Registration failed. Please try again later.

oauthCallback.missingParams: The third-party sign-in callback is missing required parameters.
oauthCallback.expiredSession: The third-party sign-in session expired. Please sign in again.
oauthCallback.bindSessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again before binding this identity provider.
